finding.title: Performance Analysis
finding.exec_summary:
Cara Losch (East) is the top performer, with the highest win_rate of 0.6442953020 (480 won_deals / 745 closed_deals), won_revenue $1,130,049.0, and an avg_cycle_days_closed of 49.0403. This win_rate is the greatest among all managers, which makes him the best.  

The second‑best manager is Summer Sewald (West), posting a win_rate of 0.6433566434 (828 won_deals / 1,287 closed_deals), won_revenue $1,964,750.0, and an avg_cycle_days_closed of 48.4678.  

The worst performer is Rocco Neubert (East), with a win_rate of 0.6208445642 (691 won_deals / 1,113 closed_deals), won_revenue $1,960,545.0, and an avg_cycle_days_closed of 45.8428.
recommendations: The second‑best manager is Summer Sewald (West)
